programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Agripreneur
programme.desc: The Philippines's premier award-winning agriculture show. The program showcases success stories in Filipino innovation, resilience, and growing agribusiness opportunities.

programme.title: Tadhana
programme.desc: An Overseas Filipino Workers themed weekly anthology that will dramatize the colorful, romantic, heroic, and inspiring stories of OFWs.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: Magpakailanman
programme.desc: A drama anthology featuring real-life inspired stories.

programme.title: Regal Studio Presents
programme.desc: A collection of weekly specials which feature timely, feel-good stories.

programme.title: Resibo: Walang Lusot Ang May Atraso
programme.desc: A public service program aimed at giving a voice to the public's grievances and complaints, exposing wrongdoing, and providing concrete resolutions.

programme.title: Heart World Season 2
programme.desc: In this limited series, Heart takes viewers deeper into her world-sharing her life, style, successes, failures, challenges, and the emotional lessons learned along the way.

programme.title: Planet Xp
programme.desc: the show merges gaming-inspired 'experience points' (XP) with Philippine adventures, covering culture, nature, and community stories in partnership with the National Council for Children's Television.

programme.title: 24 Oras Weekend
programme.desc: A weekend report on the latest happenings in the Philippines and around the world.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: Pepito Manaloto, Tuloy Ang Kuwento
programme.desc: The continuing comedic chronicle of the life of Pepito Manaloto, a lucky multimillion lotto winner, his family, and the merry mix of neighbors and colleagues.

programme.title: Bblgang
programme.desc: A refreshing, exciting and funny show with an assortment of gags, spoofs, and comic performances.

programme.title: Tbats On The Go
programme.desc: is a comedy program that features a variety of entertaining skits, pranks, MOS interviews, street performances, live musical numbers and other hilarious segments. Hosted by the dynamic and hilarious duo Boobay and Tekla, delivers a full entertainment experience that's guaranteed to liven up your weekends.

programme.title: Regal Studio Presents
programme.desc: A collection of weekly specials which feature timely, feel-good stories.

programme.title: I
programme.desc: A documentary on the different issues in society hosted by a set of trusted broadcast journalists in the country

programme.desc: The Philippines's premier award-winning agriculture show. The program showcases success stories in Filipino innovation, resilience, and growing agribusiness opportunities.

programme.title: Amazing Earth
programme.desc: An infotainment show exploring the Philippines, featuring its natural formations, diverse terrains, and fascinating flora and fauna.

programme.title: Master Cutter Marathon
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.title: Family TV Mass
programme.desc: Sunday Mass

programme.title: GMA Pinoy Blockbuster: 'Sakada'
programme.desc: Is a Philippine social-realist film about the ordeals of sugarcane farmers on the island of Negros in the Philippines.

programme.title: All
programme.desc: GMA's weekend musical comedy variety show that showcases a fun musical experience.

programme.title: Tbats On The Go
programme.desc: is a comedy program that features a variety of entertaining skits, pranks, MOS interviews, street performances, live musical numbers and other hilarious segments. Hosted by the dynamic and hilarious duo Boobay and Tekla, delivers a full entertainment experience that's guaranteed to liven up your weekends.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: Make Your Marc Season 3
programme.desc: The show highlights the Filipino game changers who have made an impact in their careers and profession. The program will share heartfelt stories and showcase their struggles and successes. These are the Filipino trail blazers that have ultimately ‘made their marc' in the community.

programme.title: I
programme.desc: A documentary on the different issues in society hosted by a set of trusted broadcast journalists in the country

programme.title: Kapuso Mo Jessica Soho
programme.desc: Features the lighter side of veteran journalist, Jessica Soho, and highlights insightful stories of a wide range of topics

programme.title: Stars On The Floor 2026
programme.desc: The program is set to bring together the biggest names from TV and the digital world, all paired up for the country's biggest dance-collab competition.

programme.title: GMA Pinoy Blockbuster: 'Balatkayo'
programme.desc: An overseas worker is forced to go back to her home country to deal with her son, whose explicit video has gone viral.

programme.title: Stars On The Floor 2026
programme.desc: The program is set to bring together the biggest names from TV and the digital world, all paired up for the country's biggest dance-collab competition.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Kamao
programme.desc: It follows an amateur boxer who dreams of fulfilling his family legacy to be a champion but his biggest fight would not be in the ring but in his home.

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: Unang Hirit
programme.desc: A news magazine show that offers humor and information from hard news to special interests segments on travel, health, housekeeping and entertainment.
